title: engelhardia formosana
intro: Engelhardia formosana is a species of flowering plant in the family Juglandaceae, commonly known as the Formosan walnut or Taiwan walnut. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing pain and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, Engelhardia formosana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used as a food ingredient.
